quiz_items.question: What is the purpose of Form FDA 3640?
options: To apply for laser manufacturing license
To report radiation safety testing for laser light shows and displays
To request variance from safety standards
To certify laser operators
quiz_items.explanation: Form FDA 3640 is the Reporting Guide for Laser Light Shows and Displays under 21 CFR 1002, used to submit radiation safety testing reports.

quiz_items.question: What happens when CDRH assigns an accession number to a submitted report?
options: The product is approved for sale
The report is entered into the database and acknowledged
The manufacturer is exempt from annual reporting
The product meets all safety standards
quiz_items.explanation: An accession number indicates the report has been entered into CDRH database. It does NOT constitute product approval - CDRH does not approve reports or products.

quiz_items.question: CDRH approval of a report means the product complies with all applicable standards.
quiz_items.explanation: False. CDRH explicitly states: WE DO NOT APPROVE THESE REPORTS OR THE PRODUCTS BEING REPORTED. It is the manufacturer's responsibility to certify compliance.

quiz_items.question: When must a manufacturer submit the required report prior to shipping products?
options: Within 30 days of first shipment
Before shipment in interstate commerce
Within 60 days of product registration
Annually with the first report
quiz_items.explanation: 21 CFR 1002 requires manufacturers to submit the report prior to shipment of products in interstate commerce, not after.

quiz_items.question: When should a manufacturer submit a supplement to an existing report?
options: Only when requested by CDRH
When providing additional information about the model family
Every 6 months regardless of changes
Only for Class 4 lasers
quiz_items.explanation: Manufacturers should reference the accession number when providing additional information about a model family in either a supplement or annual report.

quiz_items.question: Which of the following must be included in a radiation safety report? (Select all that apply)
options: Product identification and model information
Testing program and quality control procedures
Test results demonstrating compliance
Marketing plan for the product
quiz_items.explanation: Reports must include product identification, testing/QA procedures, and test results. Marketing plans are not part of radiation safety reporting requirements.

quiz_items.question: What happens if CDRH determines a report is incomplete or inadequate?
options: It receives a provisional accession number
It is rejected and returned for completion
It is approved with conditions
The manufacturer receives a warning letter
quiz_items.explanation: CDRH may reject incomplete reports and return them for completion. Rejected reports do not receive accession numbers and are not entered into the database.

quiz_items.question: Form FDA 3640 is approved under OMB Control Number _____ with expiration date July 31, 2020.
quiz_items.explanation: The form displays OMB Control Number 0910-0025, indicating compliance with the Paperwork Reduction Act.
